title: [FIRRTL] Add OMIR emission pass
body:
Add a pass to the FIRRTL dialect that consumes `OMIRAnnotation`s on the circuit, gathers the tracker nodes back up, and serializes the data back into a JSON blob.

### Todo
- [x] ~~Replace wire/reg/inst names with NLA-based symbols (#2015)~~ (will be done in a follow-up PR)
- [x] Add FIR-to-SV/JSON integration test
